title: Neutral Oritech
description: Make Oritech mod more neutral for build.
body:
This ressource pack aim to make build more simple while using Oritech.
The colors of the mod has been changed for a gray palet of my own with corespond to the steel ingot (that I modified too).

All the credits for the models, animations and textures belong to Reath, the Oritech delopper.

![All modified blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69df7693f878d5d7bdbf6c62dae7fcb460df7d03_0.webp)

This pack was made after I realised the color palette of the mod was very complicated to match with another palette. This mod has a lot of color sucha as aorange, red, purple, blue... and it's then complicated to build with colors you want.

This ressource pack was posted on CurseForge and Modrinth. Download from there if you want to support me.
